creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You should have follow this: 

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html 

More specific what will solving your issue: 

* After running cvsup to obtain the most recent ports tree. 
* After running portupgrade -a or portmaster -a to ensure that all 
applications are up-to-date. Do not forget to read in /usr/ports/UPDATING 
first before you upgrade those installed ports. 
* After searching through the FreeBSD GNOME Mailing list archives to see if 
the problem has already been reported.
